Workload: # Desired-state: bind a PIM group to a workload RBAC role. The engine
# (Apply-PimWorkloadAssignments) resolves GroupTag -> Entra group, looks up the
# role by name via the connector, and creates the assignment idempotently.
# Ship the SAME rows to every customer tenant to make them identical.
# Defender XDR: Unified RBAC must be ACTIVATED first (portal prerequisite, no
#   Graph endpoint) + RoleManagement.ReadWrite.Defender on the engine SPN.
#   Production convention: one custom Defender role per PIM group, same name.
# Intune: no activation needed (RBAC always on). RoleName = a BUILT-IN Intune role.
#   group must already be a BC SECURITY GROUP
#   Engine SPN needs SUPER in the environment.
# Azure DevOps (membership model = group nesting): Resource = org name
# Power Platform environment roles: Resource = environment id (from discovery)
#   RoleName = Environment Admin | Environment Maker. SPN = Power Platform admin.
